details.query: How many stages does GSLV MK III have?
details.actual_response:
According to the provided context, GSLV MK III is a three-stage launch vehicle with two solid strap-on motors (S200), one liquid core stage (L110) and a cryogenic upper stage (C25).

Sources: Annual_Report_2024_25_Eng.pdf, Annual_Report_2022_23_Eng.pdf, Annual_Report_2023_24_English.pdf

details.query: What is the launch mass of GSAT-11?
details.actual_response:
According to the provided context, the launch mass of GSAT-11 is approximately 5854 kg. This information can be found in the document chunk that describes the successful launch of GSAT-11 on December 05, 2018, from the Kourou launch base, French Guiana, by Ariane-5 VA-246.

Sources: Annual_Report_2024_25_Eng.pdf, Annual_Report_2022_23_Eng.pdf, Annual_Report_2023_24_English.pdf
